pageContext.name: Carnage
pageContext.description: It's your ever-lovin', totally unfriendly neighborhood Carnage!   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Carnage Fine Art Print, a brutal Marvel Comics art print by artist Kendrick Lim, AKA Kunkka.  Killer instincts bring Carnage to the Marvel Universe! When remorseless murderer Cletus Kasady bonds with the symbiote offspring of Venom, the resulting union creates a force of malevolence and destruction unlike any other. Kendrick Lim captures Carnage in all of his crazed glory, morphing his arm into a razor appendage. Black and red streaks of symbiote substance lash out all around him as he smiles at the thought of the next kill.  Originally created as a cover for Carnage #1 (2022), written by Ram V for Marvel Comics, this comic artwork is now available as a fine art collectible for fans. Each Carnage Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 400 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this sinister symbiote makes a villainous addition to any Spider-Man artwork collection.  Unleash madness on your Marvel collectibles and bring home the Carnage Fine Art Print by Kendrick Lim today!
